name: judge-ai-dredd
description: Intent tracking and goal hijacking defence for autonomous AI agents

scripts.server:bedrock: AWS_REGION=eu-central-1 npx tsx src/server.ts --backend bedrock --judge-model eu.anthropic.claude-sonnet-4-6 --embedding-model eu.cohere.embed-v4:0 --hardened
scripts.server:bedrock:interactive: AWS_REGION=eu-central-1 npx tsx src/server.ts --backend bedrock --judge-model eu.anthropic.claude-sonnet-4-6 --embedding-model eu.cohere.embed-v4:0 --hardened --mode interactive
scripts.server:bedrock:learn: AWS_REGION=eu-central-1 npx tsx src/server.ts --backend bedrock --judge-model eu.anthropic.claude-sonnet-4-6 --embedding-model eu.cohere.embed-v4:0 --hardened --mode learn
scripts.server:bedrock:rules: AWS_REGION=eu-central-1 npx tsx src/server.ts --backend bedrock --judge-model eu.anthropic.claude-sonnet-4-6 --embedding-model eu.cohere.embed-v4:0 --hardened
scripts.server:bedrock:rules:benchmark: JUDGE_DREDD_BENCHMARK_MODE=agentdojo AWS_REGION=eu-central-1 npx tsx src/server.ts --backend bedrock --judge-model eu.anthropic.claude-sonnet-4-6 --embedding-model eu.cohere.embed-v4:0 --hardened
scripts.server:bedrock:office: AWS_REGION=eu-central-1 npx tsx src/server.ts --backend bedrock --judge-model eu.anthropic.claude-sonnet-4-6 --embedding-model eu.cohere.embed-v4:0 --prompt B7.1-office
scripts.ollama:pull: ollama pull nomic-embed-text && ollama pull llama3.2
